examples: Tannometers: Used to determine the tannic acid concentration of tanning solution.
Bitter flavours in food increase the perception of bitter, tannic elements in wine.
Tannic: Tasting term used to describe the quality and intensity of tannin in red wines.
Wine geeks to a man or woman hate super-rich, clumsily tannic, high-alcohol wines--just ask them.
Just six months earlier these opaque, tongue-punishingly tannic drinks were innocent grape juice.
